cells.promotion_rule: Add a measured exact upload for sine / 1.0 Hz / 1.0 cycle / 20 pp with a non-placeholder file name to retire this preview cell.

provisional_cell.note: This cell is visible for preview, not counted as certified exact.

cells.promotion_target: 96 exact recipes after measured upload arrives.

missing_exact_cell.promotion_rule: A measured upload for sine / 1.0 Hz / 1.0 cycle / 20 pp promotes the finite exact matrix from 95 to 96 certified exact cells.

reference_only.note: Measured above-band data remains available for analysis, not for operator auto use.
